title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
